message:
Deduplicate beads: merge telemetry adapters, add 6 cross-layer deps, enrich cross-refs

Systematic review of all 206 open beads across 4 epics (bd-3un, bd-3w1,
bd-2yu, bd-2hz) and 23 standalone feature beads. Used bv --robot-suggest
(which flagged 3 high-confidence duplicates and 20 missing deps) plus
manual semantic analysis of every bead's description, dependencies, and
interaction notes.

## Merge: Telemetry Adapters (4 beads → 1)

Created bd-2yu.5.9 "Implement host-project telemetry adapters for all
target codebases" consolidating bd-2yu.5.4 (cass), bd-2yu.5.5 (xf),
bd-2yu.5.6 (mcp_agent_mail_rust), and bd-2yu.5.7 (frankenterm).

Rationale: bv flagged 97% keyword similarity. All four follow identical
pattern (implement HostAdapter trait, wire collectors, run conformance
harness). The merged bead has per-host acceptance criteria, testing
requirements, and all prerequisite dependencies from the union of the
four originals.

Closed: bd-2yu.5.4, bd-2yu.5.5, bd-2yu.5.6, bd-2yu.5.7 with comments
linking to the merged bead.

## New Cross-Layer Dependencies (6)

1. bd-2hz.5.4 → bd-11n: fsfs explanation schema builds on library-level
   HitExplanation/ScoreComponent/ScoreSource types
2. bd-2hz.4.3 → bd-1do: fsfs degradation state machine uses library
   circuit breaker as one of its degradation signals
3. bd-2hz.3.4 → bd-1hw: fsfs vector pipeline uses WAL-based incremental
   FSVI mutations (O(1) per doc vs O(N) full rebuild)
4. bd-3un.4 → bd-3un.3: Reranker trait interface references Embedder
   types (structural dependency, bv-identified)
5. bd-1cr → bd-3un.24: robust statistics monitor TwoTierSearcher
   performance metrics (bv-identified)
6. bd-2ps → bd-1do: e-process sequential testing gates share decision
   surface with circuit breaker (bv-identified)

## Cross-Reference Comments Added (10)

- bd-z3j: MMR should populate ScoreSource::MmrDiversity explanation
  variant when bd-11n is active
- bd-1do: Interaction notes with bd-3st (skip PRF when open), bd-2ps
  (coexistence with e-processes), bd-2tv (skip signals), bd-2hz.4.3
  (degradation ladder uses this component)
- bd-22k: Interaction notes with bd-21g (calibrated scores improve
  Bayesian posteriors), bd-2yj (shared calibration data), bd-1cr
  (complementary monitoring dimensions)
- bd-yrq: fsfs application for semantic change detection (bd-2hz.2.5)
- bd-2hz.5.4: Dependency note explaining library vs fsfs explanation
  layer separation
- bd-2hz.4.3: Dependency note explaining circuit breaker as one signal
  in broader degradation ladder
- bd-2hz.3.4: Dependency note on WAL-based updates + yrq fingerprinting
- bd-3un.38: Enhancement for diverse test corpus (code/config/log files)
- bd-26e: Cross-reference with bd-2n6 (exclusion syntax vs filter API)
- bd-2rq: Cross-reference with fsfs multi-project search use case
- bd-i37: Distinction from bd-3un.27 (online vs offline batching)
- bd-3un.4: Structural dependency rationale for Reranker → Embedder

## Confirmed NOT Overlapping (examined and verified separate)

- bd-3un.27 vs bd-3w1.3 (trait-gated queue alternatives)
- bd-3un.41 vs bd-3w1.12 (trait-gated staleness alternatives)
- bd-qtx vs bd-1b8 (orthogonal: quantization vs dimensionality)
- bd-l7v vs bd-1co (complementary: cache eviction vs prefaulting)
- bd-2yu.7 vs bd-2hz.7 (different products: monitoring vs search TUI)
- bd-2yu.8 vs bd-2hz.10 (different products: TUI vs fsfs testing)
- bd-i37 vs bd-3un.27 (online vs offline batching)
- All statistical/ML beads (bd-1cr, bd-22k, bd-2yj, bd-21g, bd-2ps,
  bd-6sj) verified as complementary layers, not duplicates

Final state: 211 open, 4 closed, 599 edges, 0 cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
